appointments-error-no-permission: You do not have permission to perform this action.
appointments-error-data-must-be-array: Data field must be an array.
appointments-error-end-before-start: End date and time must be after start date and time.
appointments-error-multiday-not-allday: Multi-day appointments must be all-day appointments.
appointments-error-multiday-too-long-for: Multi-day appointment is too long for the selected recurrence.
